items.name: CET_Complaint_Callstack_Spoofing
items.description: A proof of concept that makes a Windows syscall look like it came from a legitimate Windows thread pool, with no trace of your own code anywhere in the call stack. It also stays compliant with Intel CET (Control-flow Enforcement Technology), which is the hardware feature that kills most naive stack spoofing tricks.

items.name: scrapewright
items.description: LLM-powered web scraping platform. Build reusable scraping services as step-graph state machines via an AI-guided wizard, expose them through a local   HTTP API. Chrome Extension (MV3) + Node.js native messaging host. Data never leaves your machine.

items.name: Pask
items.description: PASK is a Discord-inspired chat platform built with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) and Socket.IO for realtime communication. It was built as a -learning project- to practice building a full realtime chat application end-to-end — authentication, servers/channels, direct messages, voice rooms, roles/permissions, and a bot gateway.
